results.prompt: For each business function, calculate: total subscription revenue in the last 6 months, number of unique users who subscribed to at least one module from that function, and the single highest-revenue module. Present the results sorted by revenue descending.
results.output:
| business_function | total_revenue | unique_users | highest_revenue_module |
|-------------------|---------------|--------------|------------------------|
| Research & Development | 9496000.0 | 80 | Trial Success Probability Model |
| Supply Chain | 7195500.0 | 87 | Demand Forecast Engine |
| Sales & Marketing | 7108500.0 | 77 | Market Share Monitor |
| HR & People | 6700000.0 | 83 | Talent Retention Predictor |
| Finance | 5982500.0 | 78 | Revenue Forecast Model |
